infringements.steward_decision_summary: 2026 BRITISH GRAND PRIX 03 - 05 July 2026 The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 17:45, in relation to the incident below: The Stewards From The Stewards To The Team Manager, Aston Martin Aramco F1 Team Document 52 Date 04 July 2026 Time 16:57 No / Driver 18 - L

raw_text_excerpt:
2026 BRITISH GRAND PRIX
03 - 05 July 2026
The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 17:45, in relation to the
incident below:
 
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To The Team Manager,
Aston Martin Aramco F1 Team
Document 52
Date 04 July 2026
Time 16:57
No / Driver 18 - Lance Stroll
Reason Alleged Breach of Article B4.1.1 of the FIA F1 Regulations – Car 10 allegedly
impeded Car 18 at Turn 15 at 16:09.
Gerd Ennser Tanja Geilhausen
Mathieu Remmerie Pedro Lamy
Richard Norbury
